title: nephrodium serratum
intro: Nephrodium serratum, also known as the Serrated Fern or Lady Fern, is a species of fern native to the mountainous regions of Asia and Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, burns, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Nephrodium serratum include reducing pain and inflammation, and it has been used to treat conditions such as eczema, acne, and arthritis. Nephrodium serratum can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used externally or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
